description.en: Word2Vec made word embeddings fast, useful, and widely adoptable. Skip-gram and CBOW models learned vector spaces where semantic and syntactic relationships appeared as geometry. These vectors became a bridge from count-based NLP to neural language representation.
description.zh: Word2Vec 让词向量变得快速、实用且容易采用。Skip-gram 和 CBOW 模型学习出的向量空间中，语义和句法关系表现为几何结构。这些向量成为从计数式 NLP 走向神经语言表示的桥梁。

html.en: Before word2vec, many NLP systems relied on sparse counts or hand-built features. Word2vec made dense vectors practical at web scale.
html.zh: Word2Vec 之前，许多 NLP 系统依赖稀疏计数或手工特征。Word2Vec 让密集向量在网页规模上变得实用。

html.en: The model predicts context from a word or a word from context, forcing related words to occupy nearby regions of vector space.
html.zh: 模型要么由词预测上下文，要么由上下文预测词，从而迫使相关词占据向量空间的相近区域。

html.en: Experts generally treat Word2Vec as a foundational embedding method that made distributional semantics operational at scale. Its long-term legacy is the geometric view of meaning that still informs retrieval, representation learning, and vector databases.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Word2Vec 视为基础性的嵌入方法，它让分布式语义能够规模化运行。它的长期影响在于意义的几何观仍影响检索、表示学习和向量数据库。

method.en: Skip-gram and CBOW neural word embeddings
method.zh: Skip-gram 与 CBOW 神经词嵌入

material.en: NeurIPS paper, arXiv preprint, and Google code archive
material.zh: 神经信息处理系统大会 论文、arXiv 预印本与 谷歌 代码档案

demo.en: Move through a semantic vector space
demo.zh: 在语义向量空间中移动

text.en: Predicts neighboring words from a center word.
Speeds training by contrasting observed word-context pairs with sampled alternatives.
text.zh: 通过对比真实词-上下文对和采样负例来加速训练。

text.en: Relations such as gender or capital-city can appear as vector offsets.
text.zh: 性别、首都等关系可表现为向量偏移。

site.zh: 神经信息处理系统大会 / arXiv

description.en: Primary word embedding sources; local images redraw skip-gram windows and vector analogies.
description.zh: 词嵌入原始来源；本地图重画 skip-gram 窗口和向量类比。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

label.en: Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space
label.zh: 向量空间中词表示的高效估计

label.en: Distributed Representations of Words and Phrases and their Compositionality
label.zh: 词与短语的分布式表示及其组合性
